_comment: File: stops.json | Purpose: Source-of-truth game data for the New Orleans walking tour. Loaded by engine.js, edited via builder.html.

setup.name: muff-message-1
setup.html:
Which of the following is NOT part of a Muffuletta (sandwich)?
A) French Bread
B) Olive Salad
C) Mortadella
D) Provolone

setup.name: new-stop-21-message-1
new-stop-20-message-1
setup.html: BUTTON BUTTON BUTTON

setup.name: new-send-to-lafayette-call-to-action
setup.html: Are there any Hamilton fans on your team? The musical — not the Tiger-Cats. HEAD TO THE SQUARE NAMED FOR AMERICA'S FAVORITE FIGHTING FRENCHMAN. Google it if you must. Hurry — watch for cars and streetcars. TELL ME THE FRENCHMAN'S NAME ONCE YOU ARRIVE.

setup.name: intro-we-lied
setup.html: We lied.

setup.name: intro-type-play
setup.html: This IS a team building exercise, but it's NOT a walking tour. Think Escape Room meets Scavenger Hunt. Type PLAY to find out what team you're on.

incorrect.name: intro-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: cipher-btn
setup.html: Figure out which team you're on using the Team Cipher puzzle.<button class="open-cipher-btn" onclick="openTeamOverlay()">Open Team Cipher →</button>

incorrect.name: cipher-wrong
incorrect.html: Hmm, check that spelling! If you're stuck, text 504-581-5652 for help from Mission Control.

setup.name: def-ask
setup.html:
Ok, you're TEAM {{TEAM_NAME}}, but what does {{teamName}} mean?

A)  A Native American tribe
B)  A deep-fried French doughnut
C)  A little something extra
D)  A Cajun werewolf

incorrect.name: def-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: def-correct
setup.html: {{correctMsg}}

setup.name: nav-go-to-lafayette
setup.html: Are there any Hamilton fans on your team? The musical — not the Tiger-Cats. HEAD TO THE SQUARE NAMED FOR AMERICA'S FAVORITE FIGHTING FRENCHMAN. Google it if you must. Hurry — watch for cars and streetcars. TELL ME THE FRENCHMAN'S NAME ONCE YOU ARRIVE.

incorrect.name: nav-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: arrival-photo
arrival-welcome
setup.html: Welcome to Lafayette Square, Team {{teamName}}! I'm so glad you didn't go all the way to Jackson Square. FIND THIS EXACT SPOT and then we'll take a look around. Reply with HERE! when you get to the exact spot.

incorrect.name: arrival-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: photo-prompt
setup.html: 📸 Designate a team photographer. Take a team photo here. To win this game you not only need to be the first to finish, you also need to show all of your pics! Type CLICK to continue.

setup.name: tour-politics
setup.html: You're standing in the former epicenter of New Orleans politics.

setup.name: tour-clay
setup.html: Henry Clay is here in the middle of Lafayette Square for no apparent reason. He founded the Whig Party that, upon its collapse, made way for the Republican party.

setup.name: tour-gallier
setup.html: Straight across the street, on St. Charles Avenue (where the streetcar runs) is Gallier Hall, that used to be our City Hall.

setup.name: tour-federal
setup.html: To the right of Gallier Hall is a boring looking building that Henry Clay is kind of gesturing towards, and it may secretly be the most fascinating of all.

setup.name: tour-courthouse
setup.html: Opposite St. Charles Avenue, on Camp Street, there's a huge building to your right on the other side of the square that serves as the U.S. Court of Appeals building, but it started as a good ol' post office. Can you see the statues on top?

setup.name: pwd-unlock
setup.html: Enough sightseeing. I was stalling. Hopefully Team {{partnerName}} has arrived. We need their help.

setup.name: pwd-callout
setup.html: Stay where you are. Call out HEY TEAM {{PARTNER_NAME}}. YOUR PASSWORD IS {{give}}. WHAT IS OUR PASSWORD?

setup.name: pwd-prompt
setup.html:
What password did Team {{PARTNER_NAME}} give you?

A)  Etouffee
B)  Gumbo
C)  Jambalaya
D)  Muffuletta

incorrect.name: pwd-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: gallier-correct
setup.html: Correct! {{receiveBlurb}}

setup.name: gallier-question
setup.html: Next, let's focus back on Gallier Hall. A president's funeral was held here — just not a United States president. The Confederate States of America had a president too. What was his last name?

incorrect.name: gallier-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: henry-clay-photo
setup.html:
Jefferson Davis was President of the CONFEDERATE States of America — not the United States! 😮 Here's a picture from his funeral, right at Gallier Hall, 135 years ago: https://cdm16880.contentdm.oclc.org/digital/collection/p16880coll18

Now send me a photo of you or your team with Henry Clay in the background. Why he's hanging out in Lafayette Square, I'll never know.

setup.name: ladies-correct
setup.html: Correct!

setup.name: ladies-info
setup.html: Now. Look up! Atop the roof of the John Minor Wisdom U.S. Court of Appeals Building — the one across from you on Camp Street — are four sets of bronze sculptures known as 'The Ladies': Agriculture, History, Industry and Arts. Actually there are 16 ladies because there are 4 identical statues on the roof. One on each corner. They were sculpted by Daniel Chester French.

setup.name: ladies-photo
ladies-photo-prompt
setup.html: 📸 Take a team photo of your team looking up at The Ladies.

setup.name: ladies-question
setup.html:
Daniel Chester French also designed another famous U.S. memorial. Do you know which one?

A)  The Lincoln Memorial
B)  The Statue of Liberty
C)  The Washington Monument
D)  Mount Rushmore

incorrect.name: ladies-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: fed-correct
setup.html: Oh yeah! 🎉

setup.name: fed-info
setup.html:
Next, take a look at the plain building to the right of Gallier Hall — that's the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta's New Orleans branch.

TELL ME HOW MANY DOLLARS A DAY they're talking about in the video below. Watch at least the first minute now to get the answer and you can watch the whole video later.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mwCfK1oqRkI

setup.name: fed-question
setup.html:
A)  $42.50
B)  1 MILLION DOLLARS
C)  6 MILLION DOLLARS
D)  1 TRILLION DOLLARS

incorrect.name: fed-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: bush-correct
setup.html: Bingo!

setup.name: bush-task
setup.html: Let's wander around the square for a minute. FIND A TREE PLANTED BY A BUSH AND TELL ME WHAT TYPE OF TREE IT IS.

setup.name: bush-question
setup.html:
A)  Bald Cypress
B)  Crepe Myrtle
C)  Shumard Oak
D)  Weeping Willow

incorrect.name: bush-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: sculp-photo
sculp-context
setup.html: The original monument got replaced because of a misspelled word and the original tree got replaced because it died, but hey, it's the thought that counts!

setup.name: sculp-task
setup.html: There's a sculpture across Camp Street — kinda looks like a pointing arrow. TAKE A SHORT VIDEO OF YOUR TEAM ROTATING THE SCULPTURE AND HAVE IT POINT TO THE NAME OF A FOUNDING FATHER. TELL ME HIS LAST NAME.

setup.name: sculp-hint
setup.html: 💡 HINT: Do NOT text me "Benjamin Franklin". You may have to strain your neck a bit to find his name written in stone. He was the first Chief Justice of the United States, appointed by George Washington himself. Try not to Google it.

incorrect.name: sculp-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: cuba-task
setup.html:
There's a small monument on Poydras Street with a big story. In 1850, Venezuelan-born general Narciso López — who had designed what would become his adopted country's flag — sailed from New Orleans with hundreds of soldiers, carrying that flag there for the very first time in history.

Find the monument: https://what3words.com/remake.king.cloth

Oh shoot, that map tells you the name of the country. I tell you what...

Type CLICK to continue.

setup.name: cuba-photo-prompt
setup.html:
📸 Take a team photo at the monument. Save it for later.

Type CLICK to continue.

setup.name: boggs-question
setup.html:
What do Lee Harvey Oswald, the CIA, FBI and Secret Service all have in common? They all had offices in this neighborhood at one time or another.

📸 Take a team photo in front of the building. Save it for later.

He investigated a murder. He questioned the answer. He boarded a plane and vanished. The building next to you bears his name. Who was he?

incorrect.name: boggs-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: light-task
setup.html: TAKE A PIC OF THE BEACON OF LIGHT STANDING BETWEEN JULIA AND HER BROTHER GIROD. Send me the name of the restaurant we're going to.

incorrect.name: light-wrong
incorrect.html: Ooh, not quite! 🤔 Text 504-581-5652 and Mission Control will get you sorted.

setup.name: win-end
setup.html: 🎉 You've completed the game! But wait! Quick! 🏃 Text {{TEAM_NAME}} to 504.581.5652 right now (don't type it here). The first team to do so wins a prize! 🏆
